CustomField.description: This will be automatically checked by the system when the Final value differs from the original system-generated value. A mismatch is considered an override. This applies if either the Net Unit or the Effective Rate is manually adjusted. Note : Checkbox will be checked when ( Net unit != Original Net unit OR Effective Rate != Original Effective Rate OR MR Rate (Esc) != Original MR Rate (Esc) )
CustomField.formula: OR( leaseworks__Original_Effective_Rate__c <> leaseworks__Effective_Rate__c , leaseworks__Original_Net_Units__c <> leaseworks__Net_Units__c , leaseworks__Original_MR_Rate_Esc__c <> leaseworks__MR_Rate_Esc__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This will be automatically checked by the system when the Final value differs from the original system-generated value. A mismatch is considered an override. This applies if either the Net Unit or the Effective Rate is manually adjusted.
CustomField.label: Net Unit/Effective Rate Overridden
